Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
207 

MFP_RINSTLZD_RSN_CD 
LABEL: 
Money Follows Person (MFP) ― Re-institutionalized Reason Code 
DESCRIPTION: A code describing the reason why a beneficiary was re-institutionalized after participation in the 
Money Follows the Person Demonstration; most recent in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: MFP_RINSTLZD_RSN_CD 
LONG NAME: MFP_RINSTLZD_RSN_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR
